title: senecio capitatus
intro: Senecio capitatus, also known as the round-headed groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to the presence of sesquiterpene lactones and alkaloids. The health benefits of Senecio capitatus include its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve congestion and ease coughs. Senecio capitatus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has been used in herbal medicine to help manage respiratory conditions.
